feedback.text: Please, consider adding protections to videogames that require online connectivity to function in order to ensure that said games can be enjoyed, studied and shared after the publishers and developers stop support. The European Citizens Initiative called "Stop Destroying Games" has already reached nearly a million and a half signatures; this is an issue we care about. Videogames are art, and those which are designed to required an online connection to even function are at massive risk of being lost media. This is completely preventable.
